name: semantica-ai
description: Track and grow your brand visibility across AI assistants (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, Grok, DeepSeek, YandexGPT and more). Monitor brand mentions in LLM responses, run visibility scans, analyze competitors, track publications, and get actionable GEO/AEO insights.

authentication.description: API key from your Semantica AI account. Sign up at https://ai-semantica.com

tools.name: create_scan
tools.description: Create a new brand visibility scan across AI providers. Provide either domain or brandName (or both). Returns the scan ID — use get_scan to poll results.

tools.name: list_scans
tools.description: List brand visibility scans with pagination.

tools.name: get_scan
tools.description: Get the full results of a scan by its ID, including mention rates, per-provider breakdown, citations, raw AI responses, and noCompanyMention flag per result.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: Get a list of Semantica AI projects. Pass clientId to list an agency client's projects instead of your own.

tools.name: get_project
tools.description: Get details of a specific Semantica AI project by its ID.

tools.name: list_all_projects
tools.description: Get ALL projects: your own projects plus all agency clients' projects combined in one call.

tools.name: get_visibility_metrics
tools.description: Get brand visibility metrics for a project — mention rates by AI provider, over time. Supports date range filtering.

tools.name: get_scan_results_bi
tools.description: Get detailed per-prompt scan results for BI analysis — each row contains a prompt, provider, mention flag, sentiment score, and no_company_mention flag. Use onlyNoCompany=true to filter for purely informational responses.

tools.name: get_projects_summary
tools.description: Get a high-level summary for all your projects: total scans, prompts count, last scan date, domain.

tools.name: get_zero_click_positions
tools.description: Zero-click positions report: estimated rank of your brand (and tracked competitors) in ordered lists inside AI answers. Heavy LLM call — may take 1–3 minutes.

tools.name: get_mentioned_pages
tools.description: Get a list of pages/URLs from your domain (or a competitor's domain) cited in AI responses, sorted by citation frequency.

tools.name: get_mentioned_pages_occurrences
tools.description: Get detailed occurrences of a specific URL or domain being mentioned in AI responses — with prompt context.

tools.name: analyze_competitor_sentiment
tools.description: Analyze the sentiment of AI responses regarding specific competitors across given scans. Returns average sentiment scores per competitor.

tools.name: list_publications
tools.description: List all tracked publications (articles, pages) for a project.

tools.name: add_publication
tools.description: Add a publication URL to tracking for a project. The system will monitor AI responses for mentions of this URL.

tools.name: delete_publication
tools.description: Remove a publication from tracking for a project.

tools.name: list_publication_mentions
tools.description: Get AI-response mentions of tracked publications for a project.

tools.name: list_agency_clients
tools.description: List agency clients. Agency API key: lists your clients. Semantica AI staff API key: pass agencyUserId to list a specific agency's clients.

tools.name: resolve_agency_client_id_by_email
tools.description: Find a client's user ID by email address. Agency keys resolve among managed clients; Semantica AI staff keys resolve any registered user.

tools.name: get_client_projects
tools.description: Get all projects belonging to a specific agency client.

tools.name: get_client_scans
tools.description: Get scans for a specific agency client, with pagination.

tools.name: onboarding_wizard_overview
tools.description: Get a brief step-by-step overview of the Semantica AI onboarding wizard — which tools to call at each step.

tools.name: onboarding_request_email_code
tools.description: Step 1 of registration: send a 6-digit verification code to the user's email. Use without an API key (unauthenticated).

tools.name: onboarding_verify_email_code
tools.description: Verify the 6-digit code from email before setting a password.

tools.name: onboarding_register
tools.description: Step 2 of registration: create a Semantica AI account. Returns accessToken — add it as Authorization: Bearer to MCP config.

tools.name: onboarding_whoami
tools.description: Get the current authenticated user's profile.

tools.name: onboarding_get_wizard_context
tools.description: Check onboarding state: whether an onboarding project exists, subscription info, and account profile.

tools.name: onboarding_validate_site
tools.description: Validate a domain before creating a project (checks for blocked categories like gambling, spam, etc.).

tools.name: onboarding_set_account_type
tools.description: Set the account type: business or agency.

tools.name: onboarding_save_geo_analytics
tools.description: Save the name of a GEO analytics service linked to the account (optional setup step).

tools.name: onboarding_detect_languages
tools.description: Detect the languages of a website by its domain.

tools.name: onboarding_generate_topics
tools.description: Generate topic categories for visibility tracking, based on domain, country, and site language(s).

tools.name: onboarding_generate_prompts
tools.description: Generate search prompts grouped by topics — the queries used to measure brand visibility in AI responses.

tools.name: onboarding_get_scan_setup_info
tools.description: Get scan limits and AI provider configuration before starting an onboarding scan.

tools.name: onboarding_start_scan
tools.description: Create a project and start an onboarding visibility scan. Accepts queries or topics+promptsByTopic.

tools.name: onboarding_get_scan
tools.description: Poll the status and results of an onboarding scan by its report ID.

tools.name: onboarding_start_trial
tools.description: Activate a 3-day free trial (equivalent to clicking the 'Try for free' button in the UI).

tools.name: onboarding_subscription_checkout_url
tools.description: Get a Stripe checkout URL for subscribing to a paid plan (basic or advanced). Open the URL in a browser.

tools.name: onboarding_get_billing_plans
tools.description: Get available billing plans with pricing.

tools.name: onboarding_complete
tools.description: Mark the onboarding as completed.
